description: Build a Cranelift Signature for each fn: typed (arg_types... + host_ctx -> ret_ty) for natively_callable fns, uniform (i64,i64)->i64 otherwise. Defer declare_function until after typer + analyses. Wired but not yet used at call sites — declare each fn with its computed sig; compile_fn entry / emit_return still use uniform path for now (bifurcation lands in .6.2.3-4).
title: VR.4.2.2: per-fn typed Signature builder
